term: A Little of This Going On
englishDefinitions: A small amount of some activity, behavior, or situation happening.
persianTranslation: کمی از این‌جور چیزها در جریان بودن
examples: There's a little of this going on in every office.
I noticed a little of this going on after the meeting.
If there's a little of this going on, we should talk about it.
